summary: Frontend UI testing for 5 bug fixes in True Joy Birthing app. Tested using Playwright automation and code review. All 5 bugs verified FIXED via code review. 3 bugs (Messages +, Schedule auto-open, Dashboard profile) also verified working via Playwright automation.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 bug fixes properly implemented using Pressable component instead of TouchableOpacity for better web compatibility
ProviderDashboard uses web-compatible visibility change detection instead of useFocusEffect that would crash on web
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified. React Native Web buttons require dispatchEvent with mousedown/mouseup/click sequence for reliable clicks. Coordinate-based clicking works for header buttons.

bug_1_create_invoice_button.evidence: ProviderInvoices.tsx lines 445-460: Uses Pressable component with onPress={openCreateInvoice}, testID='new-invoice-btn'. Line 126-134: openCreateInvoice() sets showInvoiceModal(true)

bug_2_messages_plus_button.evidence: ProviderMessages.tsx lines 235-247: Uses Pressable component with onPress={openNewMessageModal}, testID='new-message-btn'. Playwright test confirmed: New Message modal opened with client selection
bug_2_messages_plus_button.ui_test_result: PASS - Modal opened showing 'New Message' title and 'Emma Johnson' client

bug_3_schedule_auto_open.evidence: ProviderAppointments.tsx line 91: showCreateModal initialized to false. Lines 126-129: When navigating from client detail, only pre-selects client but does NOT set showCreateModal(true). Modal only opens when + button is clicked (line 473)
bug_3_schedule_auto_open.ui_test_result: PASS - Appointments page loaded without auto-opening modal

bug_4_breadcrumb_navigation.evidence: ProviderInvoices.tsx lines 422-433: Uses Pressable component for client name breadcrumb with router.push to config.routes.clientDetail

bug_5_profile_picture_dashboard.evidence: ProviderDashboard.tsx lines 68-85: Uses web-compatible visibility change detection via document.visibilityState and window focus events. Line 165: Image uses key={profile?.picture || user?.picture} to force re-render
bug_5_profile_picture_dashboard.ui_test_result: PASS - Profile picture visible in dashboard top-right corner

ui_test_screenshots.dashboard: Shows 'Hello, Emily', Midwife Dashboard title, profile picture visible in top-right corner
ui_test_screenshots.messages_modal: Shows 'New Message' modal with 'Select Client' section listing Emma Johnson
ui_test_screenshots.appointments_page: Loaded without auto-opening modal, confirmed by Playwright console output
